footer.description: Mboa Events 237 helps attendees and organizers find events, manage registrations, and stay informed.

about.heading: A smarter way to discover and manage events.
about.description: Mboa Events 237 connects attendees and organizers through personalized discovery, digital tickets, notifications and reliable event management.
about.pillar1Text: Find events by interests, location, date, price and activity signals.
about.pillar2Text: Receive updates when events match your interests or when registrations change.
about.pillar3Text: Register, pay when needed, and keep event tickets in one place.
about.whyTitle: More than an event listing website.
about.whyText: The platform is designed around discovery and action: users choose interests, organizers publish events, and the system notifies the right audience when something relevant happens.
about.builtForSubtitle: Each experience is focused on what that user needs to do.
about.audience1Text: Discover events, choose interests, bookmark events, register, pay and manage tickets.
about.audience2Text: Create events, upload images, manage attendees, review statistics and grow your audience.
about.audiencesSubtitle: Each experience is focused on what that user needs to do.
about.forAdminsText: Moderate events, manage users, announcements, reports, locations, categories and platform quality.
about.forAttendeesText: Discover events, choose interests, bookmark events, register, pay and manage tickets.
about.forOrganizersText: Create events, upload images, manage attendees, review statistics and grow your audience.
about.heroText: Mboa Events 237 connects attendees, organizers and administrators through personalized discovery, digital tickets, notifications and reliable event management across Cameroon.
about.whyHeading: More than an event listing website.

privacy.choicesText: You may update your profile, notification preferences and account settings from your dashboard. For privacy questions, contact our support team.
privacy.commitmentText: {{app}} is designed to help people discover, book and experience events in Cameroon. We only collect information needed to provide, secure and improve the service.
privacy.contactText: For privacy questions or account data requests, contact us.
privacy.intro: This policy explains how {{app}} collects, uses and protects user information.
privacy.s1Text: We collect account details, profile information, event interests, registration records, ticket data, payment references, feedback, reports and usage information needed to operate the platform.
privacy.s2Text: We use information to authenticate users, recommend events, process registrations, verify tickets, send notifications, support organizers, secure the platform and improve services.
privacy.s3Text: We may send verification emails, password reset emails, event updates, account status messages and important platform announcements. Users can manage notification preferences where available.
privacy.s4Text: For paid events, payment details are handled through payment providers. We store transaction references and statuses but do not store mobile money PINs or sensitive wallet credentials.
privacy.s5Text: We apply authentication, authorization, rate limiting, audit logs and operational controls to reduce unauthorized access and misuse of data.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy

terms.agreementText: By creating an account, publishing an event, registering for an event, buying a ticket or using {{app}}, you agree to respect these Terms of Service and all applicable laws in Cameroon.
terms.changesText: We may update these terms as the platform evolves. Important updates may be communicated through email, in-app notifications or public announcements.
terms.intro: These terms explain the rules for using {{app}} as an attendee, organizer or administrator.
terms.needHelpText: For questions about these terms, contact support.
terms.s1Text: Users must provide accurate information, protect their login credentials, verify their email address when required, and use the platform lawfully.
terms.s2Text: Organizers are responsible for publishing accurate event details, prices, ticket types, venue information, schedules and images. False, abusive or misleading events may be removed.
terms.s3Text: Tickets are linked to confirmed registrations and may be verified using QR codes at event entrances. Ticket transfer or misuse may lead to refusal of entry.
terms.s4Text: Paid events may use mobile money payment providers. A registration for a paid event becomes confirmed only when the payment is successfully verified.
terms.s5Text: The platform may moderate events, suspend accounts, remove content or restrict access when there is fraud, abuse, policy violation or security risk.
terms.title: Terms of Service
